description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:jdk8 Docker image. Define two stages, build and deploy. Add a build_master job in the build stage that runs the command ./gradlew build. Add a pages job in the deploy stage, set to manual, that depends on build_master and runs ./gradlew test-extensions:asciidoctor, then creates a public directory and copies the generated Asciidoctor documentation from test-extensions/build/docs/asciidoc/ into public. Configure the pages job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact for GitLab Pages.
